meta_title: For Founders: client workflow to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Client Workflow to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop guessing what to build. Learn how to implement a client workflow to identify profitable SaaS ideas using Antigravity and Claude Code. Start today.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for 'ideas' and start mining for 'problems.' By implementing a systematic client workflow, you identify manual bottlenecks in existing businesses. Use Antigravity to map these inefficiencies and Claude Code to rapidly prototype solutions. Focus on high-value, repetitive tasks that businesses are already paying humans to perform manually.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You’ve spent weeks scrolling through forums, hunting for the 'perfect' SaaS idea, while the clock ticks on your runway. The truth? Ideas aren't found in a vacuum; they are hiding in the messy, manual spreadsheets and fragmented workflows of small businesses that are desperate for automation.

Today, we stop building for ourselves and start building for revenue. We are going to deploy a high-velocity client workflow that transforms operational friction into a validated product roadmap. With Antigravity’s architectural precision and Claude Code’s rapid execution, you will move from 'no idea' to a functioning MVP in hours, not months.

steps.title: Identify Operational Friction
steps.description: Select a niche and interview one stakeholder to identify their most repetitive data-entry task. We are looking for 'copy-paste' work that costs them money.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following business process: [Paste Interview Notes]. Identify the top 3 manual bottlenecks that can be automated via a web-based SaaS tool. Rank them by potential time saved per week.

steps.title: Define the MVP Scope
steps.description: Narrow the scope to a single feature that solves the primary bottleneck. Avoid feature creep; focus on a single-purpose utility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean technical specification for an MVP that solves [Bottleneck]. Include a database schema for user profiles and the primary task input. Keep it to 3 tables max.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate schema.prisma from MVP spec'

steps.title: Scaffold the Foundation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the boilerplate code based on your Antigravity schema. This saves days of setup time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a project structure for a Next.js application with authentication and the database schema defined in Step 2.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Scaffold Next.js project with Prisma and NextAuth'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic
steps.description: Build the core automation script that executes the client's manual task. This is the 'value' part of your product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust TypeScript function to process [Manual Task] using an external API. Include error handling and logging for production readiness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement core automation logic in /lib/tasks.ts'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push your code to a live environment and give the client access. Real-world feedback is the only validation that matters.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment checklist for a Vercel-hosted Next.js app. Include environment variable configuration and database migration steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy to Vercel and confirm build success'

pro_tips: Always charge for your MVP; if they won't pay $50 for a beta, they won't pay for the full version.
Build the 'admin' dashboard first; managing your users is more important than the user-facing UI in the early stages.
Use Claude Code to write automated end-to-end tests; it prevents regressions when you pivot based on client feedback.
Focus on 'Time-to-Value'—if the user isn't seeing a result within 60 seconds of login, your workflow is too complex.
Ignore scaling concerns until you have 10 paying customers; premature optimization is the death of a founder's vision.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, capture screen recordings of your first users interacting with the product. Use these clips to refine your onboarding flow and start cold-emailing prospects in the same niche.
content.conversion_block: Don't let another day pass building things nobody wants. Stop guessing and start shipping profitable SaaS solutions today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
